reviews.comment:
Pasamos a cargar nafta,buena atención y precios,tiene lo necesario en despensa para el viaje y servicios, como el baño.y dispenser con buena agua caliente.

(Translated by Google)
We stopped to fill up with gas. The service and prices were good. They have everything you need in the pantry for the trip, as well as amenities like a bathroom and a dispenser with good hot water.

reviews.comment:
Está estación de servicio tiene prioridad de atención a todo aquel q sea socio del acá pero si no se es igual se lo atenderá con otro costó cuenta con servicio de taller de lavado automotor sus empleados son calificados y de cordiales modales al tener taller incluído cualquier problema q presente el auto en el mismo lugar q se carga se puede reparar pero eso es lo sobresaliente ya q de romperse el.auto no ahí q andar por todos lados para conseguir mecanico...

(Translated by Google)
This gas station prioritizes service for all members, but non-members will be served at a different price. It has an on-site car wash and repair shop. The employees are qualified and courteous. Having the workshop on-site means any problem your car might have can be repaired right where you fill up. That's the best part, because if your car breaks down, you don't have to go all over town looking for a mechanic.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvcl9Tc0dBEAE

reviews.comment:
Solo cargamos combustible, buena atención y servicial el personal de playa, había cola, el único detalle que no tenía playa de estacionamiento, los de adelante bajaban a comprar o baños mientras cargaban y el resto debíamos esperar que vuelvan

(Translated by Google)
We only loaded fuel, good service and helpful beach staff, there was a line, the only detail was that there was no parking lot, those in front got off to buy or restrooms while they loaded and the rest of us had to wait for them to come back
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvdDd2WVRBEAE

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
